titleStmt.title: SII 33.66: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 66. (A.R. No. 16 of 1947.) Lōmaḍa, Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Stone setup in the ruins outside the village.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Mārgaśira ba. 10 corresponding to 1547 A.D., November 7, Monday.

Records that assignment of toll-income collected from the village Lōmaḍa, of Ghaṇḍikōṭa sīma to Kṛishṇarāya-bhūshaṇam and Achyutarāyabhūshaṇam by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Naṁdēla Timmayadēva at the bidding of Rāmārāja, on the command of the king Sadāśivarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu . svastiśrī vijayādbhudaya śālivā
hana śakavaru¨rṣaṁbulu 1469 Agunēṭi plavaṁga saṁ
vatsara mā¨rgaśira ba 10 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsivamahārāyalu
vajraśiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍhai pṛthvivi sāṁbrājyaṁ cēyu
cuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmaṁmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara naṁddēla tiṁ
maya dēvamahārājulugāru sadāsivarāyala Ānatini
rāmarājamudulanu kriṣṇarāyabhūṣaṇaṁ Acyutarāyabhūṣa
ṇaṁ gāriki yiccina dha¨rmmaśilāśāsanakramameṭlaṁnannughaṁḍikōṭa
sīmalo cimeṭlūri vubhayamā¨rgasuṁkhaṁ mīku [A¨rpitā]nāraṁ celle lomaḍa
yi lomaḍaku grāma grāmānaku celle niḍivela gala yīrākṣagrāmālaku ce
gānu grāmakaṭnaṁ maggastāvarālu yīgrāmāṁlōpaṁḍina jonnalu
vaḍlu pratti nulu guṟralu baṁḍi tottu sahā Aṁmminaṁdu su
sukhaṁ mīre tiddukonaṁgalavāru yī saraku konavacā¨rlakumīku yicina
cimeṭlūri ṭhāṇeṁveḷinaḍanakānu celliṁcagala vāraṁ yi Āni veyi
ṁccina dha¨rmmiśilāśāsanaṁ Ī grāmānaku yī suṁkānaku yavvaru tappi
nānu kāsilōnu tama tallitaṁḍrādulanu gōvu brāṁhmalanu vadhiṁcina
pāpānapōvuvāru braṁhma kṣatriya vayiśya sūdra saṁkara
jātulu mōdalayināvāru yavvaru tappinānu vāriki bhūṣaṇa
ṁgāri goḍugu sandibestaboyaṁḍu vānāḷiki
vānāliki gā¨rdhabhame magaḍu
Digital edition of SII 33.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
